song.title: Grow in Me
song.author: Kelly Scaletta
song.presentation: V1 V2 C V3 V4 C V5 V6 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D G D Lord, when I’m bad I get so sad. . D A It seems the Lamb I never knew. . D G D But blood was shed, depression fled. . D A D So now I hide in You.
[V2] It’s in the Son I have begun. It’s in the Son I’ll onward go. In Him I’ll walk. In Him I’ll talk. In Him I’ll surely grow.
[C] .D A O Jesus, now grow in me! . D A I want for You to be . D G Pleased to be in me what You want to be, . D G And when it gets too hard, feel free . D A D To grow some more in me.
[V3] With flags unfurled, here comes the world! Its beauty does my heart embrace. But it grows pale whene’er that veil Removed displays Your face.
[V4] As my heart turns, with love it burns. Your face is all I want to see. Your image, Lord, which I adore, My image soon will be. .. .. --- [V5] Lord, I’m not strange, I just can’t change. It’s not from lack of effort, though. The more I try, the more I find I need for You to grow.
[V6] Where I have failed, Lord, You’ve prevailed. The secret of success, I know, That all I need is life indeed, I pray for You to grow.
